Dear Sir/Madam, I'm Ceci from EN+, EV charger and solution provider. 

We are looking for opportunity to provide EV charging station in Azbaijan. 

We have 8 years experience in EV charger,  and shipped 220K chargers in 2022. Our partners include Toyota, Sungrow, Eaton etc.

Could you please advise how can we support the sustainable industry in Azbaijan? Thank you.

Hello, I would like to ask what standard for AC charging connector, such  as CCS1 and Type 1 or China's GB/T,  is used for electric vehicles in Azerbaijan and what kind of socket does your EVs use?

Dear Friend,

Noticed you are in the market for electric vehicle charging station. We can supply you the cutting edge EV charging station and intelligent charging solution on content-based charging of mobile communication network. 
We are Qingdao Hardhitter Electric Co., Ltd. We are professional DC and AC charging station manufacturer in China. Do you want our catalog? Or we can have a on-line meeting, we can show the truly our to you?
Our 60kW and 120kW integrated DC EV charging station are hot sale in the market. But we can base your requirement details to OEM the best charging station to you. And we can design your charging cloud solution to help you enlarge your market. 
If you have any other questions, pls contact me. We will happy to supply you the best service.

Best regards
Andrew

Telephone:86-18754217251
WhatsApp:+86-18754217251
Email: contact@hardhitter.cn
www.hardhitter.cn

Salam,

Elektrik doldurma menteqesi (zapravka) acmaq isteyirik. Bunun ucun ilk once 5 sharj cihazi almaq isteyirik. Bunun ucun Dovletden hansi icazeler (hansi qurumlardan), senedler lazimdir? Texniki destek nece olacaq? Cihazi (sharj cihazini) qurashdirmaq lazimdir, yoxsa nece?
Yer Bakidadir (ozumuze aiddir), podstansiya var. 

Hormetle, Ramil

Hello


I'm the  CEO: Pieter van Oord owner of Royal Van Oord is a Dutch maritime contracting company that specializes in dredging, land reclamation and constructing man made islands. Royal Van Oord has undertaken many projects throughout the world, including land reclamation, dredging and beach nourishment, we are in a collaboration with an American firm called Helman Hurley Charvat Peacock / Architects, Inc.We have selected ten counties from the world to build man made islands which come with airports and harbors, this is a major change in the construction industry, well we are looking for future investors in these projects. Reply to this email address for more details.I'll upload some of my brochures for you to look at,



Thank you
CEO: Pieter van Oord

Dear my friend,

This is Tiger From SHENZHEN OUKAI LOGISTICS.  It is a freight forwarder focusing on logistics of Air, Sea, Railway and Road. 

The company provides a full range of services such as booking, customs declaration, and trailers.

The advantage of our company is railway transportation and I have sufficient expertise in freight forwarding.Mainly engaged in cargo transportation in countries along the Belt and Road.

There is some good shipping rate from China.

If you are troubled by the transportation of goods or want to optimize the existing transportation process, you might as well give us a chance. We will serve you wholeheartedly and provide strong support for your business development.



If you are not in charge of this business, please help me tell your colleagues.

This is  Allen from China, we're the No.1 EV Charging station manufacturer in China. We offer reasonable prices and higher-quality charging stations. If you compare our prices with other suppliers, you may see that we have a good advantage.

Dear All,

I’m Hakan Senakin, the EVC Sales and Business Development Executive at Vestel, a leading EVC producer in Turkey. We are the market leader in Turkey and one of the largest EV charger suppliers worldwide.

Azerbaijan is one of our target markets, and after reviewing your solutions in the EV charging sector, I would like to get in touch with you.

I would appreciate the opportunity to meet, introduce our customized products, and discuss potential business development possibilities.

Thank you in advance for your interest. I look forward to your feedback.

Best regards,
Hakan Senakin
EVC Sales and Business Development Executive
hakan.senakin@vestel.com.tr
+90 554 472 94 30

Greetings Respected,

 Through the research made at Jaguar Landrover, we have noticed that ELCAR has been the pioneer for the EV Charging Infrastructure in Azerbaijan. 
Hence, would like to understand what Charging standard is available? CCS2? or are there any signs of change for this?
Also, which chargers do customers desire? AC or DC? And what power levels?

It would be a pleasure to understand the vision of ELCAR in the EV charging Industry for Azerbaijan.

Looking forward for your response
 
Thank you
Regards
